title: Hot work + rising flammable gas during shift changeover

brief.summary: NEAR-band compound finding in B-04: hot work permit activity coincides with rising LEL on LEL-04A during changeover.

hypotheses.cause: SIMOPS: hot work near rising flammable atmosphere

recommendedBarriers.action: Suspend hot work near EQ-OVEN-1 in B-04 until LEL-04A is stable below watch band

openQuestions: Confirm purge completeness on the work package
